eval_dimensions.name: Criteria Resolution
eval_dimensions.description: Loads plugin-default checks for the work type, applies repo overrides (remove/replace/add), and filters by active modes

eval_dimensions.name: Check Execution
eval_dimensions.description: Runs each automated check, resolves {pr_number}/{repo} placeholders, evaluates expect/expect_contains/expect_gt fields, and reports a pass/fail table

eval_dimensions.name: Merge-Gated Completion Gate (GH-729)
eval_dimensions.description: Never offers or auto-selects 'Work complete' while an associated PR is open/unmerged; recommends background review-monitoring instead; reserves completion for the merged (or PR-less) state

evals.name: open-pr-recommends-monitor-not-complete
evals.prompt: /Dev10x:verify-acc-dod feature  (session: friction_level guided; all automated checks pass; PR #42 is OPEN and awaiting review)
evals.description: Tests that when every acceptance criterion passes but the associated PR is open/unmerged, the gate recommends 'Monitor for review' (routing to Dev10x:gh-pr-monitor) and NOT 'Work complete'.
evals.expected_output: AskUserQuestion fires with 'Monitor for review (Recommended)' as the first option, routing to Dev10x:gh-pr-monitor. 'Work complete' is NOT offered as the recommended option while PR #42 is unmerged.

assertions.text: Resolves PR merge state via pr_detect / verify_pr_state before deciding the gate
Recommended option is 'Monitor for review' routing to Dev10x:gh-pr-monitor
'Work complete' is NOT the recommended/auto-selected option while the PR is open/unmerged

evals.name: adaptive-open-pr-auto-starts-monitor
evals.prompt: /Dev10x:verify-acc-dod feature  (session: friction_level adaptive, active_modes [solo-maintainer]; all checks pass; PR #42 OPEN, unmerged)
evals.description: Tests that at adaptive level with an open/unmerged PR, the skill auto-starts the background monitor instead of auto-completing, and the residual terminal task becomes 'Monitor PR #N for review / merge'.
evals.expected_output: No 'Work complete' auto-completion. Skill(Dev10x:gh-pr-monitor) is dispatched in the background; the residual task is 'Monitor PR #42 for review / merge'. No AskUserQuestion interruption.

assertions.text: Does NOT auto-complete 'Work complete' while the PR is open/unmerged

evals.name: merged-pr-allows-work-complete
evals.prompt: /Dev10x:verify-acc-dod feature  (session: friction_level guided; all checks pass; PR #42 is MERGED)
evals.description: Tests that once the PR is merged (or the work is PR-less), the gate offers/auto-selects 'Work complete' as before.
evals.expected_output: AskUserQuestion offers 'Work complete (Recommended)' because PR #42 is merged.

assertions.text: 'Work complete' is the recommended option once the PR is merged
